reason: The Cursor CLI rejected the harness allowlist token before provider inference on all five assignments.

cursor.root_cause: Cursor 2026.07 renamed the --allowed-tools enum from mcpToolCall to mcp_tool_call.
cursor.score_treatment: not_run; the raw zero rows are infrastructure failures and are excluded from model or full-system summaries

claude.observed_routing: Every request reported claude-fable-5 and claude-opus-4-8; the runner rejected the fallback.

codex.score_treatment: engineering data only; not compared because the paired Cursor configuration did not run

remediation.cursor_preflight: After switching to mcp_tool_call, Cursor reported GLM 5.2 High, made 40 public episode tool calls, and exited normally; its preflight submission was invalid.
remediation.next_panel: All five v1 episodes are retired. A fresh, separately precommitted v2 panel is required for the three-system comparison.
